Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Programs.asp

# SBDC Government Procurement and UH APEX Routing Process

## BOSS government-contracting sequence
1. If the user is only thinking about starting a business, keep SBDC primary and focus on validation, operations, and readiness.
2. If the user is newly selling but has little track record, use Government Jumpstation to educate them by stage.
3. If the user is an existing for-profit business with a legally formed entity, products/services it can actually sell, and relevant experience/capacity, consider UH APEX Accelerator.
4. Use APEX for registrations, certifications education, market research, bid/no-bid review, solicitation guidance, and government accounting system education.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee certification, contracts, awards, loan approval, or eligibility. Do not fill out procurement forms for the user. Route to official resources and advisors.
